Experiments Overview
We possess two research questions we seek to answer about
WORKSWORLD:
1. (RQ1) How does increasing the size of the workflow and
resource graph affect the state space ENHSP searches?
2. (RQ2) Does the domain definition permit scaling to large
enough problems to plan and schedule workflows centrally across an enterprise? We design and execute two experiments. First, we leverage our configuration and problem generator to observe state
space growth from Table 3 by individually increasing object
types.

9 Conclusion
A broad body of literature addresses workflow scheduling and planning. We focus on work most similar to our
pipelined-workflow approach using AI planning techniques. We introduced WORKSWORLD, a numeric domain for in- First, we discuss available planning domains for compute
